title: LUMIÈRE Mobile Shopping App Prototype
description: High-fidelity iPhone 15 Pro mockup for LUMIÈRE luxury sofa brand shopping app. 5 interactive screens with elegant cream, deep brown, and muted gold palette.
screens: Onboarding - Brand introduction with hero sofa visual
Home Feed - New arrivals, space inspiration, recommendations
Product Detail - Sofa image, materials, sizes, pricing, color selection
Cart & Checkout - Order summary, delivery, payment confirmation
Profile - Orders, favorites, appointments, membership benefits
designStyle: Luxury minimalist, cream and deep brown palette, muted gold accents, high-end home magazine aesthetic
interactionFeatures: Product color selection with active state
Cards, buttons, and tags with refined mobile details
Full iPhone 15 Pro frame with Dynamic Island and Home Indicator
